notes: v350 — FREEZE FIX (the real one this time) + Undo removed from the portfolio. FREEZE: I profiled every heavy action with a bigger dataset and found the true culprit — the app was drawing the whole results table (up to 300 rows, each packed with signals and tags) in one blocking burst on every filter, sort, search and scan. On a phone that locked the screen for a few seconds each time. Now the table paints the top rows instantly and streams the rest in the background, so it never freezes to redraw — the worst pause dropped from about 0.6s on a fast computer (several seconds on a phone) to well under 0.1s. I also trimmed the default number of rows shown (Show all is still there) so the list fills fast, and moved a background counter off the critical path. UNDO: removed the auto-sell Undo from the portfolio as you asked — the '🪤 Restore all auto-sold' banner and the per-row ↩ Undo buttons in History are gone. Nothing else about your trades or numbers changed. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v350. ALSO RECENT — v349 — data is labelled 'end-of-day', not 'live'. v348 — Portfolio redesigned into four tabs. v347 — earlier load-speed fix. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
